title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password to ensure it returns 200 status and a valid Sanctum token for authenticated access.

title: getapistudentswithvalidtoken
description: Test GET /api/students with a valid Bearer token to verify it returns 200 status and a list of students accessible to authorized users.

title: getapiclasseswithvalidtoken
description: Test GET /api/classes with a valid Bearer token to confirm it returns 200 status and a list of classes for authenticated users.
